description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image. Define a single stage called deploy. Add a job named pages in the deploy stage that executes the exact command echo 'Nothing to do...' and then publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the master branch and do not use any services, caches, or additional variables. Ensure the pipeline deploys the static site via GitLab Pages when the master branch is updated.
